name: core
description: Operating system for building with AI — input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace, session-retrieve, per-profile enforcement, C3c token-compression bundle (RTK native-tool whitelist + MCP output compression), opt-in local metric telemetry, v1.9 identity stamping, v1.13 permission-gate (PermissionRequest meta-permission per PERMISSIONS charter — one install consent, zero recurring prompts for Sutra-scope operations), v1.14 Bash permission-prompt plain-English summarizer (non-technical accessibility for remaining prompts; implements H-Agent Interface P7/P11), and v1.14.1 feedback-routing-rule (UserPromptSubmit hook — stops the vinitharmalkar pattern where Sutra offered to file GitHub issues on a user's behalf; injects a behavioral rule when feedback-intent keywords are detected).

profile.title: Enforcement profile
profile.description: individual = warn-only, telemetry off. project = warn-only, telemetry on (default). company = HARD block on missing depth markers, telemetry on.
